hoshi_section.title: Delivery Pipeline
hoshi_section.subtitle: Reusable static workflow layout with JSON-driven content

cards.name: D1 Intake Form
cards.trigger: A request arrives through your chosen intake channel.
features: Collect project scope and owner details

cards.name: D2 Qualification Review
cards.trigger: The team reviews fit, effort, and delivery timing.

cards.name: P1 Delivery Plan
cards.trigger: A qualified item moves into planning.

cards.note: This section block is optional. Use it when you want a detailed checklist inside the same stage layout.

cards.name: E1 Build Workstream
cards.trigger: Planning is approved and work begins.

cards.name: L1 Release Approval
cards.trigger: The team completes execution and requests release approval.

cross_stage.name: Company-Wide
features: Track blockers across the full workflow

pain_points: Process Order:
C1.1.1 Client orders 22kg and 50kg cylinder variants. C1.1.2 C1.1.3
Fulfil Order:
C2.1.1 Using Sales Order, XX (Delivery Head) schedules delivery [vehicle, capacity, route].
C2.1.2 Warehouse generates 📜Picklist and picks LPG/products.
C2.1.3 Warehouse generates 📜Delivery Receipt (2 DRs and 2 CRs).
C2.1.4.1 Warehouse submits 📜DR to Acctg to make General Ledger and Inventory.
C1.1.4.2 Driver gets 📜Delivery Receipt (DR) from Warehouse XXX? for multiple clients. Driver loads the cylinders. LUTXX.
📜Delivery Data include tank serial number, customer type, LUT number, gross weight, body/tare weight, and content out.
Driver and Pahinante drive to client locations. C1.1.4.3 No Delivery/For Pick up. Warehouse XX gives 📜DR to customer for signature.
C1.1.5.1 On client site, Pahinante weighs and records the cylinders, then delivers the cylinders. He retrieves the empties cylinder/s and weighs XX it in the vehicle.

C1.1.5.2 Client signs 📜DR and picks up the items and returns empty cylinder. Client leaves. C1.1.5.3 1-3kg, above and below, roundup/down, classification. Acctg charges client based on agreed weight, not actual weight. Company absorbs any gains. C1.1.6 P gives XX memo to client, containing credit gain (kg) and acknowledges receipt (via sign). C1.1.7 Driver returns to Plant. LUTXX Driver and Warehouse Staff weigh XX empty cylinders in Plant. Driver writes the weights. C1.1.8 Driver submits record and signed DR and AR to Acctg. C1.1.9 Acctg Staff reconciles open General Ledger with signed DR and AR. Acctg Staff reconciles inventor in Gsheet.
Compute Gains: C3.1.1 Gather the weight in and weigh out records at the Client and at the Plant. C3.1.2 Record in 💻Gsheet. C3.1.3 Record in 💻ACPAC. C3.1.4 Compute Commission and Distribute.
Process Order: C2.1.1 Industrial clients orders selected cylinder tanks. C2.1.2 C2.1.3
Fulfil Order: Order fulfillment procedures
Compute Gains: Commission calculations
Process Order: C3.1.1 Client orders 2.5kg and 11kg cylinder variants. C3.1.2 C3.1.3
Fulfil Order: Order fulfillment procedures
Compute Gains: Commission calculations
Process Order: C4.1.1 C4.1.2 C4.1.3
Fulfil Order: Order fulfillment procedures
Compute Gains: Commission calculations
C5.1.1 Plant Manager receives the Purchased Lorry Tanks XX and gets the DR and Invoice from delivery team.
C5.1.2 Plant Manager fills up Receiving Report (RR), and unloads contents to Storage Tank.
C5.1.3 Plant Staff measures content volume using gauge and takes photo of the gauge. Makes report.
C5.1.3.1 Changes in the qty are reported after the Receiving Report.
C5.1.4 Stock Transfer: Gas content is refilled from Storage Tank to cylinders following FIFO process. Filled cylinders are located in the 'Floor Stock'.
C5.1.5 Use Google apps for refilling cylinders.
2 Storage Locations: Tank 1 and Tank2
2 Types of Residue: Regular and WIWO. Regular Residue affects inventory count but not billing. WIWO affects inventory count and billing (as credits).
Next-step ownership is unclear
Schedule and follow Pull-out Calendar and Pull-out Dates at client sites.

Cylinder Monitoring: C5.3.1 Cylinders are purchased annually. They have individual serial nos. (S/N). C5.3.2 Cylinders have lifespan of X years. Required to Repaint and testing XXX. Put batch no for commissioning
